title: AP CM Targets Land Resurvey 2.0 by 2027, Alleges YSRCP Tampered With Records
description: The CM, while participating in the 'Mee Bhoomi–Mee Hakku' (Your Land, Your Right) programme in Bapatla district, distributed pattadar passbooks and highlighted the government's commitment to transparency and secure land ownership for citizens across the state.
